parsed.production_notes: The video uses a static photograph of a human model as the background, with animated digital UI elements overlaid on top.

characters.appearance: Young woman, short dark hair with micro bangs, fair skin.
characters.wardrobe: Blue t-shirt, black lanyard, black rectangular sunglasses.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with short dark hair and sunglasses holds a Frappuccino with whipped cream and caramel drizzle. She wears a blue t-shirt and a black lanyard. The background is a plain grey surface. The lighting is soft.
A blank white rectangular area with rounded corners.

scenes.visual_description: A woman holds a Frappuccino. An app interface overlay shows English phrases for ordering flavors with German translations. Handwritten yellow text is on the left. The app interface cycles through vanilla, caramel, and mocha flavors.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Bestell deinen Frappuccino wie ein Profi.
I'd like a vanilla Frappuccino.
Ich hätte gern einen Vanille-Frappuccino.
Jetzt sprechen...
I'd like a caramel Frappuccino.
Ich hätte gern einen Karamell-Frappuccino.
Beispiel
Du
Neustarten
I'd like a mocha Frappuccino.
Ich hätte gern einen Mokka-Frappuccino.
